{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230252052F220773694A284C99DD"}"},"total":12995},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7074892150857171743","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一个把学生当自己孩子的老师陈楚的故事！讲述了如何把坏孩子改造成对社会有用的人才！人称三百六十行，行行抢饭吃！除了生孩子，其他全都会的老陈！是一个真正为人师表的老师！小说里面充满了正能量，也很欢乐，非常适合每天等更新，值得推荐阅读！我看到很多人说这个可以拍成电视剧，那我希望不是就拍一部，而是许多部！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1647251697,"group_id":"7006310552901258247","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"(„ಡωಡ„)栓Q","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8Gv3JPxkSq2Bku/gv3z/nSJ5hPAuVi8Tovrhkdev3id","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/88ebeb142cd642769b1c566d692d2d46~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791254&x-signature=ZLCJ6amE6qe7G6Tk1D9A1GtBLOU%3D","user_id":"2444933152912222","user_name":"白焌晏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2444933152912222","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7006310552901258247","book_info":{"abstract":"两个月气走三个班主任。
面对有着教师修罗场，学渣游乐园之称的学渣特长班——七班。
即使教导主任开出极高的待遇，一群老教师们也是一个个坐如泰山，无人肯领命。
恰在这时，作为实习教师的陈楚激活最强教学系统。
于是毛遂自荐，成为七班新的班主任，从零开始打造世界最强特长班。
体育特长生：“我奥数竞赛全国第一。”
绘画特长生：“我科研竞赛全国第一。”
舞蹈特长生：“我知识竞赛全国第一。”
升学在即，领导视察，全懵了。
“让你代管特长班，怎么全保送清北了！？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c8bc3370e2129d745d6cb7f816598624","author":"向阳的心","author_id":"","book_id":"7006310552901258247","book_name":"让你代管特长班，怎么全成学霸了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7008554361853116942","read_count":"16935","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3636663"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"1689","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/901d152220c15798ee18c984076f2a8f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389525&x-signature=nB2RsWjOE9UZlGRHUh6f2ESsDZI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.36537837e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230252052F220773694A284C99DD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读75小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":130,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":34190,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":270727,"reply_count":13,"show_pv":58623},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7102855178797990690","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本文诙谐幽默，节奏紧凑，而且非常听取读者见，读者说不喜欢看副本就不开副本了。（也确实不该开）全
